body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
This PR removes zenith angle exchange from the coupler. This follows the change in this ClimaLand [PR](https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaLand.jl/pull/1135). The `CoupledRadiativeFluxes` driver now takes a start date, latitudes, and longitudes as an argument, and the driver updates cosine zenith during its update function.

Removing the zenith exchange requires bumping the lowest compatible ClimaLand version. Alternatively, we could check what version of ClimaLand is being used, and update cosine zenith in the coupler with older versions of ClimaLand


## To-do
<!---  list of proposed tasks in the PR, move to "Content" on completion 
- Proposed task
-->


## Content
removes cos_zenith from the interfacer

title: Tr/remove zenith angle
